Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense an air of maturity[n]through the slightly ajar door...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can't bring myself to enter the club...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} was at least[n]{f 4 31 2 2 1 0}, I might be able to go in...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I plucked up my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}[n]and stepped into the club.[n]{f 1 1}
